---
name: Refactor Request
about: Propose a maintainability or structure improvement
title: "Refactor Needed: "
labels: refactor, enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Area

Describe the package, file, API, or workflow that needs refactoring.

## Current Problem

Describe the maintainability, correctness, performance, or design issue.

## Proposed Direction

Describe the intended shape of the refactor.

## Risk And Impact

Describe expected behavior, API, dependency, test, or documentation impact.

## Additional Context

Add examples, related issues, or constraints.
